dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3642 IS: Welfare Abuse and Laundering Zillions Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Marshall introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To direct the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services to investigate certain payment increases under State programs funded by the Department of Health and Human Services.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Welfare Abuse and Laundering Zillions Act or the WALZ Act.

section.header: Requiring investigations of certain payment increases under State programs funded by the Department of Health and Human Services
section.text: In the case that the total amount paid to providers of services and suppliers under a State program that receives Federal financial assistance administered by the Secretary of Health and Human Services during any 6-month period increases by 10 percent or more as compared to that amount during the prior 6-month period, the Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services shall open an investigation into such program.
